name: Kenadyr Mining (Holdings) Corp.
summary: Kenadyr Mining (Holdings) Corp. evaluates, explores for, and develops mineral properties. The company explores for gold. It holds a 100% exploration license in the Borubai gold project that covers an area of 164 square kilometers located in the Chuy Region, the Kyrgyz Republic. The company was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
